settings.sqSetupDesc: Upami anjeun hilap sandi anjeun, anjeun tiasa pulih aksés ku ngawalon 3 patarosan. Anjeun tiasa nganggo patarosan anjeun nyalira atanapi patarosan standar.
settings.sqFillAll: Mangga eusian sadaya patarosan sareng jawaban
settings.pwReminderDesc: Pariksa bulanan - pastikeun anjeun apal sandi login anjeun.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Kami ngarékoméndasikeun pikeun ngamutahirkeun sandi anjeun nalika anjeun asup, supados anjeun henteu kaleungitan aksés.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Hapus cache média sareng data samentawis?

Konci sareng setélan énkripsi MOAL dipupus.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Sesi kudu aktip salila sahenteuna 7 poé pikeun ngaganti sandi.

Waktu sésana: {daysLeft} poé.
settings.waitDaysWarning: 7 poé teu kaliwat. Mangga antosan {daysLeft} dinten deui.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
aksés geolocation nampik.

1. macOS: Setélan Sistem → Privasi → Layanan Lokasi → aktipkeun pikeun browser
2. Browser: klik ikon konci dina palang alamat → Lokasi → Ngidinan
3. Reload kaca

aksés geolocation nampik.

panic.callSettingsNote: Catetan: Mode Force TCP sareng Relay tiasa nambahan latensi tapi masihan privasi maksimum.
panic.desc: Sadaya data dina node ieu bakal dihapus sacara permanén. Tindakan ieu teu tiasa dibatalkeun.
panic.filesDestroyed: Sadaya file sareng média parantos diancurkeun
panic.msgsDeleted: Sadaya pesen parantos dihapus sacara permanén
panic.warningBody:
Anjeun badé ngancurkeun sadaya data sacara permanen.
Aksi ieu teu tiasa dibolaykeun.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Kabéh ngambah dihapus. sési ieu réngsé.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Nalika nampi konci rohangan anyar — otomatis diteraskeun ka sadaya alat anjeun (diénkripsi E2E)
privacy.backupHint: Énkripsi sadaya konci nganggo frasa sandi sareng simpen ka server. Nalika ganti alat — pulihkeun nganggo hiji frasa.
privacy.crossSignHint: Verifikasi otomatis alat anyar ngalangkungan tanda tangan HMAC (perlindungan tina substitusi)
privacy.federatedHint: Distribusikeun pecahan cadangan anu diénkripsi ka node féderasi (skéma Shamir).
privacy.historySyncHint: Salinan anu diénkripsi tina pesen sayogi di sadaya alat. Server ngan ningali noise
privacy.ktHint: Log append-only tina sadaya parobihan konci publik sareng rantai hash (Merkle).
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Transfer konci ka alat anyar ngalangkungan kode 6 digit. Konci diénkripsi nganggo ECIES.
privacy.ssssHint: Pisahkeun konci master kana N bagian nganggo skéma Shamir. Mana waé M bagian bakal mulihkeun konci (ECIES).
privacy.title: Privasi

settings_profile.profileIconOver: Ikon ditingalikeun di luhur latar tukang profil

contactSync.desc: Pariksa mana tina kontak telepon anjeun geus aya dina Vortex. Nomer telepon di-hashed - server henteu pernah ningali aranjeunna.
contactSync.noMatches: Henteu aya kontak anu kapendak dina Vortex

ide.noBotToken: Proyék ieu henteu ngagaduhan set Bot Token.

keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Lebetkeun kecap akses pikeun énkripsi. Inget eta - recovery tanpa eta mustahil.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Lebetkeun frasa sandi anu anjeun anggo nalika nyiptakeun cadangan.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Pupus cadangan konci? Peta ieu teu bisa balik.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Cabut sadaya saham konci? Pamulihan liwat kontak anu dipercaya bakal mustahil.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Konci master anjeun bakal dibagi kana saham N nganggo skéma Shamir. Sakur saham M bakal ngijinkeun pamulihan konci. Unggal dibagikeun énkripsi pikeun kontak dipercaya husus.
keyBackup.noContactsWithKeys: Henteu aya kontak sareng konci umum
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Sahenteuna 2 peers aktip kalawan enkripsi diperlukeun
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Pupus cadangan gabungan? Shards on peers bakal tetep, tapi metadata bakal leungit.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Build your bot visually — no code needed
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Welcome message when user starts the bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Welcome! I am your bot. Use /help to see commands.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Responds when a user sends a specific command (e.g. /help, /start). You can add conversation steps to create multi-step dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Responds when a user message matches a pattern. Uses regex — e.g. "hello|hi" matches both words. Case-insensitive.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: The first message users see when they start the bot with /start. Every bot should have one.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Sends a message automatically on a schedule. Great for daily reminders, weekly digests, or periodic announcements.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branches the bot logic. Check a variable or user input and respond differently based on the result.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot picks one response randomly from the list. Perfect for jokes, tips, greetings, or varied responses.
botConstructor.docsApi: Makes an HTTP request to an external API and uses the response in the bot message. Use {data.field} to reference response fields.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Sends a notification to the room admin when triggered. Useful for alerts, new user notifications, or moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Add steps to a Command block to create interactive dialogs. Each step asks a question, waits for the user answer, and saves it to a variable. Use variables in the final response with {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Use curly braces {variable} in response text to insert dynamic values. State variables persist across messages.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Built-in variables available in every response:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: You can use HTML-like formatting in responses:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Start with a Welcome block — it is the first thing users see
botConstructor.docsTip2: Add a /help command that lists all available commands
botConstructor.docsTip3: Use conversation steps for registration, surveys, or data collection
botConstructor.docsTip4: Combine Condition blocks with variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Test your bot by talking to it in a room after deploying
